title: PostgreSQL Type Conversion Flow
interaction_flow: PostgresTypeMetadataPerf.setup() → createColumn(modifierIndex): creates AbstractReplicationMessageColumn with PostgresType.UNKNOWN + typeWithModifiers string
initMetadata() → new TypeMetadataImpl(columnName, type, typeWithModifiers, optional)
TypeMetadataImpl.parseModifiers(typeWithModifiers, columnName): match TYPE_PATTERN regex → extract 'mod' group → split by TYPEMOD_PATTERN
TypeMetadataImpl.<init>: if modifiers[0] present → type.length(parseInt(mod)) + type.scale(parseInt(mod)) [OID-specific switch]
TypeMetadataImpl.<init>: if modifiers[1] present → scale = parseInt(modifiers[1])
prime(): execute SQL_TYPES query (pg_catalog.pg_type JOIN pg_namespace LEFT JOIN enum_values) → ResultSet
createTypeBuilderFromResultSet: new PostgresType.Builder(typeRegistry, name, oid, jdbcId, modifiers, typeInfo)
prime(): if no parentType/elementType → addType(builder.build(), schemaName) immediately
prime(): delayed builders (with parent/element refs) → resolve after first pass → addType()
addType(): oidToType.put + nameToType.put (qualified + unqualified) + special OID caching (geometryOid, hstoreOid, etc.)
TypeRegistry.get(int oid): oidToType.get(oid) → if null → resolveUnknownType(oid) [SQL_OID_LOOKUP]
TypeRegistry.get(String name): nameToType.get(name) → strip quotes → qualified/unqualified fallback → resolveUnknownType(name) [SQL_NAME_LOOKUP]
TypeRegistry.get(String schema, String name): nameToType.get(qualified) → fallback get(name)
JSON/JSONB: Json.builder(); UUID: Uuid.builder(); POINT: Point.builder()
default(unknown OID): typeRegistry.geometryOid() → Geometry.builder() / hstoreOid() → hstoreSchema() / ltreeOid() → Ltree.builder() / etc.
PostgresValueConverter.converter(Column, Field): switch(oid) → returns ValueConverter lambda
NUMERIC: data → convertDecimal(column, fieldDefn, data, decimalMode)
BYTEA: data → convertBinary(column, fieldDefn, data, binaryMode)
hstoreOid: data → convertHStore(column, fieldDefn, data, hStoreMode)
enum types: data → convertString; unknown with JDBC fallback or convertBinary
convertHStore(column, fieldDefn, data, mode): if mode==JSON → convertHstoreToJsonString(); else → convertHstoreToMap()

createArrayConverter(column, fieldDefn): typeRegistry.get(oid) → arrayType.getElementType() → build elementColumn → schemaBuilder(elementColumn) → converter(elementColumn, elementField) → data → convertArray(..., elementConverter)
convertArray(column, fieldDefn, elementType, elementConverter, data): if List → stream map resolveArrayValue → elementConverter.convert; if PgArray → getArray() → loop elementConverter.convert
resolveArrayValue(value, elementType): special TZ re-offset for TIMETZ/TIMESTAMPTZ array elements; else pass-through
schemasAndValuesForStringEncodedNumericTypes(): OPTIONAL_STRING_SCHEMA for all decimal fields incl NaN/Infinity
schemaAndValuesForBinTypes(): Bits.builder(n) for bit-varying; OPTIONAL_BYTES for bytea
key_relationships: TypeMetadataImpl caches parsed modifiers in static LRUCacheMap<String, String[]>
PostgresType holds: name, oid, jdbcId, modifiers, TypeInfo (from pgjdbc), parentType (UDT hierarchy), elementType (arrays), enumValues
PostgresType.Builder depends_on TypeRegistry (resolves parent/element OIDs during build())
TypeRegistry holds Map<String,PostgresType> nameToType + Map<Integer,PostgresType> oidToType
TypeRegistry depends_on PostgresConnection (for SQL_TYPES / SQL_OID_LOOKUP / SQL_NAME_LOOKUP queries)
TypeRegistry depends_on SqlTypeMapper (maps typeName → JDBC int)
PostgresValueConverter depends_on TypeRegistry (for dynamic OID checks: geometry, hstore, ltree, vector, etc.)
PostgresValueConverter depends_on PostgresConnectorConfig (HStoreHandlingMode, IntervalHandlingMode, DecimalMode, BinaryMode)
PostgresTypeMetadataPerf (JMH) benchmarks AbstractReplicationMessageColumn.getTypeMetadata() call with LRUCache hot/cold paths

type_metadata_parsing.cache: Static LRUCacheMap<String, String[]>(128) keyed by typeWithModifiers string
type_metadata_parsing.length_scale_resolution: modifiers[0]=typmod for length/precision; modifiers[1] for scale; fallback to PostgresType.getDefaultLength/Scale via TypeInfo.getPrecision/getScale/getDisplaySize

special_type_oids.note: Dynamic OIDs resolved at startup via TypeRegistry.prime() — not hardcoded, vary per PostgreSQL instance

important_notes: TypeMetadataImpl is lazily constructed (first call to getTypeMetadata() triggers parse)
JMH benchmark specifically measures hot-path cost of getTypeMetadata() with LRUCache
TypeRegistry.prime() uses two-pass strategy: simple types first, then delayed builders with parent/element OID refs
PostgresType.getRootType() walks parentType chain to find base type (supports UDT hierarchies)
convertDecimal uses DecimalMode config: PRECISE→BigDecimal/Bytes, STRING→string, DOUBLE→float64
convertArray handles both List<> (streaming) and PgArray (snapshot JDBC) sources
TIMETZ/TIMESTAMPTZ array elements require special timezone re-offset (JVM TZ applied by PgArray driver)
HStore: MAP mode → Map<String,String> schema; JSON mode → Json.builder() string schema
AbstractRecordsProducerTest is abstract base test class; provides expected SchemaAndValueField lists for all PG type categories
